74523.subject: 💰 The Funding: Is the bitcoin bottom in? Crypto funds weigh in
74523.body:
Crypto funds share their bitcoin and market outlook, and where they see the best risk-reward today.

The Funding ( https://www.theblock.co/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Written by Yogita Khatri | Edited by Zack Abrams

Happy Sunday, and welcome to the 53rd edition of The Funding!

Bitcoin has corrected sharply in recent weeks, and bottom calls are everywhere. Some say the worst is over. Others think prices could still move lower.

I asked crypto funds where they think bitcoin is in its current cycle, how they're positioning portfolios, where they see the best opportunities, and where they think bitcoin is headed next. Let's dive in.

*THE INSIDE VIEW*

*Crypto funds on bitcoin and what's next*

Every major bitcoin correction brings the same question: Is the bottom finally in? Some say the market has already reset. Others expect ( https://www.theblock.co/post/404316/cryptoquant-sees-bitcoin-bottom-near-53600-while-demand-remains-deeply-unfavorable?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) more downside. I wanted to see what professional investors at crypto funds are actually saying and doing.

Most investors I spoke with think bitcoin could still move lower. The broader view is cautious, with many pointing to macro uncertainty, weaker liquidity, ETF outflows, and capital rotating into AI and traditional markets as reasons prices could face further pressure.

*David Grider, partner at Finality Capital and head of the firm's liquid opportunities fund* , said the fund turned cautious on bitcoin and digital assets in early October 2025, when the largest liquidation event in crypto's history ( https://www.theblock.co/post/375220/the-funding-crypto-vcs-unpack-the-largest-liquidation-event-in-history-and-whats-next?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) occurred, and has remained defensive since. "Our current view is that bitcoin is in the mid-to-late stages of the current market cycle downturn," Grider said. "We don’t see a true market bottom until late Q3 or early Q4 this year."

Even investors who think bitcoin has likely found its bottom aren't expecting a strong rally anytime soon. *Richard Galvin, executive chairman and chief investment officer at Digital Asset Capital Management* , said he has a "relatively neutral" outlook for bitcoin over the next 12 months, while *Cosmo Jiang, general partner at Pantera Capital* , said the widely followed four-year bitcoin cycle ( https://www.theblock.co/post/388479/this-time-is-different-bitcoin-drop-revives-four-year-cycle-fears-but-k33-says-another-80-decline-is-unlikely?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) could still keep the bear market ( https://www.theblock.co/post/402091/cryptoquant-bitcoin-bear-market-pattern-sentiment-extremely-bearish?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) going for a few more mo

74520.subject: The Daily Degen - June 14th, 2026
74520.body:
View this post on the web at https://thedailydegen.substack.com/p/the-daily-degen-june-14th-2026

Happy Sunday dear frogs!
Let’s get after it!
As always… stats/alerts/etc at top and tweets/news/links/videos/etc at bottom… and all tweets are hyperlinked so just click on them to pull them up on Twitter/X!
Market Update
Crypto (from @CryptoBubbles

QQQ (Nasdaq 100): $721.34
Gold: $4,218.30
Silver: $67.91
Oil (WTI): $84.88
US 10Y Treasury: 4.483%
Crypto Fear & Greed Index (from coinmarketcap(dot)com): 20
Biggest Price Movers
(From @coingecko top 1000, by 24 hour change)
Spotlight
All sorts of extremely bullish things happening in the world of Mantle friends! 
As per the tweet below:
“-Tokenized @SpaceX equity ($SPCXx) by @xStocksFi, went live on Mantle, tradeable 24/7 via @Fluxion_network…
-@MerchantMoe_xyz kicked off Project X alongside xStocks: incentivized liquidity provision around the clock with boosted $MNT rewards for $SPCXx holders…
-@UR_global joined the @Circle Alliance Program…
-@InsightXHQ, an AI-native prediction market, went live on Mantle, starting with World Cup season...
-2026 World Cup predictions went onchain via @byreal_io Predict....
-@Bybit_Official teased something fresh landing on June 15, taking RWA beyond trading....”
These are just a few of the bullish developments, so make sure to read the tweet in full for more info!
Also, make sure to check out the new report on Mantle from Messari, available via the @CryptoRick98 thread below!
And as always make sure to follow Mantle on Twitter/X for more updates [ https://substack.com/redirect/f7f509cd-aaa2-477a-b4d9-459c49900866?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], and stay tuned as we continue shining a light on all the cool things they are doing!
Biggest TVL Movers + Other Interesting Data
Chains are mostly green today. 18 of the top 25 chains are green on the weekly. 
Protocols are mostly red today. 15 of the top 25 protocols are green on the weekly.

(note: this includes new projects we find through combing Twitter each day and going through newly launched protocols added by @DefiLlama, limited primarily to new projects that have at least some TVL or are followed by at least some of our mutuals… Disclaimer: these are not pre-vetted by us so make sure to DYOR!)
-New project called @Igra_Labs has been added to @DefiLlama, categorized as a staking pool protocol on Igra chain. Twitter bio states “Igra Network is MEV resilient EVM layer on top of Kaspa BlockDAG. Mainnet is live.” Followed by 6 of our mutuals.

74516.subject: 📰 AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest — June 14
74516.body:
AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: CryptoBeholder.com


Автор: CryptoBeholder.com

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-june-14-cryptobeholder-t35pf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3B0Nhjp8urQvuTXwiCzAn1vw%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=3vrdyj7E8K3ck1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mqe0o02q~3x-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqe0o02q-3x
  
🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: A July 1 MiCA cutoff looms for millions of EU crypto users while a DPRK-linked $36M hack and a UK naval seizure exposing USDT sanctions evasion show that crypto's geopolitical risk is no longer theoretical. 🚨 Millions of EU Crypto Users Face Exchange Cutoff as MiCA Deadline Hits in Days On July 1, 2026, the temporary operating permission that allowed crypto companies to serve EU customers while awaiting a full MiCA license expires — and exchanges, brokers, and wallet services that have not secured authorization must immediately cut off access to European users with no further grace period. CryptoSlate reports that the deadline creates a live operational crisis for ordinary investors who may lose access to their funds, positions, or platforms overnight, with little notice from providers scrambling to reach compliance. Read full story 💀 Humanity Protocol's $36M Hack Linked to Suspected North Korean Hackers Cybersecurity firm Quantstamp has attributed the $36 million breach of Humanity Protocol to suspected North Korean threat actors, identifying a fraudulent phishing email spoofing crypto exchange Bithumb as the attack's primary entry vector. The incident adds another eight-figure sum to the growing ledger of assets stolen by DPRK-affiliated hacking groups, which have systematically targeted blockchain projects to fund state programs operating under international sanctions. More details ⚖️ CFTC No-Action Letter Opens First Legal Path for Digital Commodity Perpetuals in the US The CFTC issued a staff no-action letter that clears a legal runway for perpetual futures contracts on digital commodities to operate within the United States — a product category that has until now existed almost exclusively at offshore venues to sidestep regulatory uncertainty. The guidance provides immediate operational clarity for US-domiciled exchanges and their institutional clients, who have long been unable to offer the perpetual swap structures that dominate global crypto derivatives volumes. Read more 📊 SEC Proposes Reg NMS Rule Changes That Could Reshape Tokenized Stock Trading The SEC has proposed rescinding Rules 611 and 610e of Regulation NMS — the order-protection and access rules that have governed US equity market structure for two decades — in a move with substantial downstream implications for how tok

74511.subject: Well Informed: Have scientists unlocked a master switch for cancer?
74511.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MDd9AAcAAAAAAq6D5KgpRiFScsiq8AShYINZwKonu-Gty4OEsXuH2xKxt4l-37hvgYKBhLdIZoxZMtSgSHuoizOL1do0hxtP4uqtkrIzXswIOF3hgjktDikO 

June 14th 2026

 

 
 
 
Well Informed

 Your evidence-based guide to health and wellness


 
 
 






 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MDd9AAcAAAAAAq6D5KgqOZonUIjlVdTXYY5hCSU9kQ6rF__dqkBKpX7ryjwRQl_YbKYlY6enDFOl4cSEbYJvMhuOdAl7R4GDnO7U6nxR8YaNmTXkvT3RH2Kp 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MDd9AAcAAAAAAq6D5Kgr7jgirEA4VgFaS1srrakh58qztpMXAG5kylyTpYqAnuFUBUmbdX-Hy-eLuBJrvUZdU4WZBcAB5Z6GwHIGrY-Iym3oYYSvE_X_2NdU 


Have scientists unlocked a master switch for cancer?


Tim Cross

Senior science writer


Almost a year ago we ran a 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MDd9AAcAAAAAAq6D5KgsnWBNdaTTc5K_G5iuo0L0LVha1Ir8Pt7-Ks57747PvP0cunuUKMp6s_gX022cz30Wbb6cqa6Lxrmc0aC7tuqaYaN7d_ouwoQ 
cover story  highlighting the slow, grinding—but very real—progress that the world has made in the “War on Cancer” since Richard Nixon, then America’s president, first declared it in 1971. As we wrote at the time, good news often goes unreported, especially when it happens gradually, as it has with cancer.

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MDd9AAcAAAAAAq6D5Kgt_KgfaqQNT5qjn9nFvpqEgQs6sVliuODet-xM8BEIh1l7i0tD_M6hWMCf7fw7P6Jjgwekp4OPGS5o2HAdbWZ1x4
